hero.eyebrow: AN MBA THAT FITS YOUR JOB
hero.art_prompt: Priya, a 28 year old Indian working woman in smart-casual, smiling as she studies on a laptop in the evening at home after work, warm lamp light, balanced and aspirational.

panels.narration: Priya wanted an MBA, but could not pause her career.
panels.img_prompt: Priya, 28, in office wear looking at a laptop between work tasks, ambitious but busy, modern workplace, thoughtful.

panels.narration: A full-time campus MBA meant quitting her job.
panels.dialogue: Do I give up my salary?
panels.img_prompt: Priya looking torn, glancing between her office ID badge and a campus MBA brochure, soft conflicted expression, tidy desk.

panels.narration: Then she found a recognised MBA she could do online.
panels.img_prompt: Priya's face lighting up with relief at a laptop showing a 100% online MBA, warm glow, cosy home study corner in the evening.

panels.narration: Now she studies evenings and weekends, career intact.
panels.img_prompt: Priya happily attending a weekend live online class on her laptop at home, notebook beside her, calm and confident, warm light.

turn.title: Why An Online MBA Just Works
points: Study 100% online, anytime, from your phone or laptop. No campus, no commute.
Weekend live classes plus recordings, so learning fits around a full-time job.
The same UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ MBA, recognised for jobs, promotions and higher studies.
Just ₹2,00,000 for the full 2-year MBA (₹50,000/semester), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.

testimonials.name: Priya Menon
testimonials.quote: I earned my MBA without a single day off work. Weekend classes and recordings made it possible.

testimonials.name: Sana Iqbal
testimonials.quote: The monthly EMI fit my salary, and the schedule fit my life. It genuinely just worked.

testimonials.name: Divya Rao
testimonials.quote: A recognised degree earned online. My new employer accepted it without a second thought.

testimonials.name: Meena S
testimonials.quote: I studied around work and family and still graduated on time. That flexibility changed my career.

facts.v: 100% online, learn anytime with weekend live classes
0% interest EMI from about ₹8,333/month, or an education loan
UGC-entitled online MBA, NAAC A++ accredited
